description: Violation checker: After each step completes, compare observed tool_use events against the step's agent template (`allowedTools`/`disallowedTools`). Classify: VIOLATION (disallowed tool used), WARNING (tool not in allowedTools but not explicitly disallowed).

completions.notes: Stale-row reconcile (sweep 2026-06-16). Violation checker shipped (Wave 3 03ebfff): lib/capability-checker.js compares observed tools vs agent allowedTools/disallowedTools, classifies violation vs warning. feature.json never reconciled from PLANNED.
